description_long: This is a stylized humanoid doll with a pale complexion, long lavender hair styled in thick, wavy sections, and a distinctive outfit. The doll wears a deep red dress with a white collar, black bow, and a purple apron-like overlay featuring a heart motif. Its arms are outstretched horizontally, and it has black and white striped stockings paired with dark boots. The face is detailed with large eyes and a small mouth, giving it a slightly somber or neutral expression. The overall design suggests a gothic or Lolita-inspired fashion, with intricate details in the clothing and hair.
description: A gothic-style doll with long lavender hair, a red dress, striped stockings, and detailed facial features. The outfit includes a white collar, black bow, and purple apron overlay.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's face, full dress, outstretched arms, and striped stockings.
description_view_1: Side view (right) with only a portion of the doll's arm and leg visible, highlighting the sleeve and boot.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the head, hair details, and the back of the dress and arms.
description_view_3: Side view (left) with a partial glimpse of the doll's leg and arm, showing the boot and sleeve.
attribute_clothing_style: Gothic Lolita-inspired outfit with a deep red dress, white collar, black bow, purple apron overlay with heart motif, and black and white striped stockings paired with dark boots.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides, legs straight and close together, head facing forward, and torso upright.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with large eyes open, small closed mouth, and relaxed eyebrows.
attribute_hair_style: Long, thick, wavy lavender hair styled in multiple sections with some tied into side pigtails.
